name: Full Consensus with High Volatility Filter
hypothesis: The top-performing consensus signal (combining BBO, deep-book, and shape imbalance) is even more profitable during periods of high short-term volatility. The filter aims to isolate regimes where imbalances resolve into larger, more profitable price moves, boosting expectancy.
mutation_note: Based on feedback to 'add_regime_filter', this spec adds a volatility filter (rolling_realized_vol > 40) to the parent formula, attempting to increase expectancy per trade.
